title: USD Specializes Namespace Source Contract

included: wrapping a base NamespaceSource with direct specializes composition
reading source-visible specializes fields from base prim inputs
listOp<ObjectPath> explicit specialize paths, otherwise prepend followed by append
mapping specialized prim roots and descendants onto the specialize-authoring prim path
recursive direct specializes expansion through specialized source prims
implied specializes arcs from stronger upstream layer-stack sites at the same specialized source path
remapping path-valued field contents authored under specialized source specs into the specialize-authoring namespace
all target prim opinions stronger than specialized opinions
specialized opinions globally weaker than local, inherits, variants, relocates, references, and payloads by LIVERPS strength placement
effective population specifier selection across target and specialized specs
ordered child prim name composition across target and specialized specs
ordered property name composition across target and specialized specs
diagnostics for invalid specialize paths and missing specialized prims
deferred: unbounded specializes recursion without cycle diagnostics
full listOp composition beyond the source-visible field value exposed by the base source
attribute value resolution and time sample interpolation
provider-owned stage population or instancing behavior

model.SpecializesNamespaceSource: A namespace-source provider backed by a composed non-variant base NamespaceSource that applies direct specializes arcs.
model.BaseNamespaceSource: The composed non-variant namespace input, currently produced by usd-inherits-namespace-source in this bounded graph. usd-composition-arbitrator is the terminal provider that can merge payload opinions with this source's specializes opinions.
model.SpecializeArc: A source-visible object path item from a prim's specializes field, identifying a prim whose composed opinions are specialized by the prim where the arc is authored.
model.SpecializeMapping: The specialized source prim path mapped to the specialize-authoring prim path, with descendants and properties projected by replacing the specialized source prefix with the target prim prefix.
model.RecursiveSpecializesClosure: The transitive closure of specializes arcs reachable through specialized source prims. A source prim's own opinions are stronger than opinions introduced by that source prim's specializes arcs, while all specializes opinions remain globally weakest against non-specializes opinions on the specializing prim.
model.ImpliedSpecializesArc: A specializes arc implied at an upstream layer-stack site that contributes stronger opinions at the same specialized source path as a weaker authored specializes target.
model.ContributingSources: Adapter rendering of strong-to-weak ContributingOpinion records. Domain records store source identity separately from semantic spec paths.

input.baseSource: target-native NamespaceSource exposing specializes and composed prim/property opinions

output.specializes: direct specializes arcs with primPath and sourcePath

output.exists: whether target or specialized source specs contribute a prim-like input at the path
output.childNames: composed child prim names before stage mask or active filtering
output.propertyNames: composed property names before schema fallback injection
output.contributingSources: strong-to-weak target or specialized source contributors

output.exists: whether target or specialized source specs contribute an attribute or relationship at the path
output.fields: strongest authored field per field key
output.contributingSources: strong-to-weak target or specialized source contributors

input.path: absolute composed prim path, variant-selection prim path, or /

output.opinions: strong-to-weak contributing opinions after direct specializes have been applied as globally weakest opinions

laws: the specializes source consumes a base NamespaceSource and must not require stage population to know whether opinions came from base layers, references, payloads, relocates, inherits, or specializes
the specializes source must not open files, resolve assets, or inspect parser-local USDA syntax
specializes are read from the source-visible specializes field on base-source prim inputs

specialized source resolution must be source-visible and layer-stack aware: a target path named by a specializes arc is resolved through the applicable composed base namespace or layer-stack context, not only through the layer where the specializes arc text was authored
specialize source records must retain specialize-authoring prim paths, specialized source paths, and mapped contributor paths as semantic path handles/references rather than raw strings
specializes contributingSources domain data must be typed ContributingOpinion records, not composite source:path strings
specialize path items must be prim paths and must not be property paths
a missing specialized prim must be diagnosed with the specialize-authoring prim path and specialized source path
the specialized source prim maps to the specialize-authoring prim path, and descendants are mapped by replacing the specialized source prefix with the specialize-authoring prim path
properties under a specialized source prim map to the corresponding property under the specialize-authoring prim path

direct specializes arcs authored on specialized source prims must be expanded transitively, preserving the rule that each source prim's own opinions are stronger than opinions introduced by that source prim's specializes arcs

recursive specializes expansion must detect cycles by semantic specialize-authoring path, specialized source path, and mapping context; cycles must be diagnosed and must not recurse unboundedly or crash generated implementations

when a referenced or otherwise weaker layer stack authors a specializes arc to a source path and stronger upstream layer stacks contribute specs at that same source path, implied specializes arcs must make those upstream source-path opinions available at the specialize-authoring prim

implied specializes opinions from stronger upstream layer-stack sites remain specializes-family opinions: they are weaker than local and inherit opinions on the specialize-authoring prim, but stronger layer-stack sites at the specialized source path are stronger than weaker specialized-source sites within the specializes family

path-valued field contents authored on specialized prims or properties, including listOp<ObjectPath> targetPaths and connectionPaths, must be remapped by replacing the specialized source prefix with the specialize-authoring prim path before the fields are emitted
specialized targetPaths and connectionPaths elements outside the specialized source subtree remain in the shared composed namespace because direct specializes map between prims in the same namespace
path-valued field remapping is namespace composition and does not imply full listOp composition, dictionary merging, or attribute value resolution
all opinions on the specialize-authoring prim are stronger than opinions introduced by its specializes arcs
specialized opinions are applied as globally weakest LIVERPS opinions: weaker than local, inherits, variants, relocates, references, and payloads in the full composition model

the concrete graph may evaluate specializes after inherits and before variants so variants can compute selections from the complete non-variant opinion set; this evaluation order must not be read as field-strength order
variant composition must treat specializes opinions as weaker than selected variant opinions when it inserts selected variants at their LIVERPS strength
nested specializes authored on specialized source prims participate in recursive direct specializes expansion in this provider
for non-special field keys in this first contract, field maps expose the strongest authored field value and do not combine dictionaries, listOps, time samples, or values
childNames returned by this source are already composition-ordered; stage population must preserve this order for sources declaring child_ordering=composed
propertyNames returned by this source are already composition-ordered; stage population must preserve this order for sources declaring property_ordering=composed
adapter JSON may seed base, sublayer, reference, and relocate layers for conformance tests, but domain APIs exchange NamespaceSource, path, token, and field value objects

adapter_protocol.input: A JSON file containing one case with rootLayer, optional sublayers map/list, optional referenceLayers map, and an ops array. The adapter constructs the configured base namespace-source chain before constructing the specializes namespace source.
adapter_protocol.output: A JSON object with ok, diagnostics, and results.
